description_long: This lamp features a striking conical frame composed of four wide, evenly spaced circular rings connected by vertical supports, creating a cage-like structure. At the center, a slender, mesh-like column rises from a round, solid base, suggesting a modern, industrial aesthetic. The rings are made of a light-colored material, likely wood or painted metal, while the central mesh and base are dark, possibly black metal. The open, airy design allows for maximum light diffusion and visual interest, making it a statement piece in any urban environment. The lamp's structure is both functional and decorative, with the geometric rings providing a sculptural quality. Its size and form suggest it is intended as a floor lamp for large, open spaces.
description: A large, conical floor lamp with four wide, light-colored rings and a central black mesh column on a round base, combining industrial and sculptural design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full conical shape, all four rings, and the central mesh column clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the rings and the profile of the mesh column, with the base partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the mesh column and rings symmetrically displayed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the rings' depth and the mesh column's profile from the other side.
